description: Address all 7 issues from the semantic review (2025-07-02-review-v1.md): off-screen Timer accumulation, SecurityScoreGauge 60fps repaint, Scanner Pause/Stop buttons, Monitor/Assets icon collision, XDR ID collisions, Monitor critical state, TopBar dropdown click interception.
steps: 1. Bind all Timer 'running' properties to page visibility across Dashboard, SIEM, XDR, Monitor, Firewall, EDR, Incidents, StatusBar pages
2. Throttle SecurityScoreGauge shimmer repaint from 60fps to 15fps using a dedicated Timer
3. Wire Scanner Pause and Stop buttons with proper click handlers and paused state
4. Change Monitor sidebar icon to a distinct Unicode codepoint
5. Replace XDR investigation ID Math.random with a monotonically incrementing counter
6. Add low-probability path to 'critical' in Monitor service health flicker logic
7. Add enabled guard to TopBar dropdown panel content during close animation
acceptance_criteria: All page Timers are gated on visibility (running: visible && ...)
SecurityScoreGauge Canvas repaints at ~15fps max for shimmer effect
Scanner Stop button sets scanning=false, Pause button toggles a paused state
Monitor and Assets have different sidebar icons
XDR investigation IDs never collide (use incrementing counter)
Monitor service health can reach 'critical' state
TopBar dropdown panels do not intercept clicks while fading out
findings: All 7 review issues addressed. Build passes (ENABLE_QT=OFF). All 1618 tests pass. Changes are QML-only and verified syntactically via successful C++ build.
